title: A Day in the Enchanted Valley of Sintra

scenes.text: Explore a fairy tale town with palaces that look from another world.
This is Sintra, perched in the hills of the Lisbon region.
Sintra is a UNESCO World Heritage Site known for its romantic 19th-century architecture.
Each palace whispers stories of royalty and whimsy.
scenes.label: STORIES OF ROYALTY

scenes.text: Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: 📍 Sintra, Lisbon Region - Portugal. A magical town filled with colorful palaces and breathtaking views. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
